summary: AI/ML Engineer and BTech Computer Science student Krish Chaudhary specializes in building end-to-end Machine Learning workflows and predictive modeling solutions. By integrating API development with SQL-driven data analysis, I focus on deploying robust AI models that solve complex business automation challenges. I successfully implemented a multimodal AI orchestration system, improving response latency by 50% while ensuring seamless integration within scalable software development lifecycle environments.

bullet_points: Audited 6+ months of historical sales records using Python to identify 18% discrepancy rates caused by inconsistent manual data entry across legacy spreadsheets.
Mapped 'order-to-delivery' lifecycles through process walkthroughs with 5+ key personnel, identifying 3 major bottlenecks within the manual inventory tracking and SQL-based systems.
Translated manual billing requirements into a structured technical roadmap for an automated BI platform, addressing 100% of core operational gaps using relational databases.
Executed granular statistical audits across 15+ major crop variants using Python, identifying soil-specific yield variations and production strengths for localized agricultural data analysis.
Devised a multi-stage data cleaning framework for multi-unit standardization, reducing total dataset preprocessing time by 60% through automated Python scripts and SQL logic.
Authored 10+ pages of high-level technical documentation detailing the architectural design and statistical methodologies used for agricultural machine learning and data science analysis.

projects.name: OrderEazy Analytics
bullet_points: Architected an asynchronous RESTful API using FastAPI and SQL to automate invoice generation, achieving a 90% reduction in manual billing and credit discrepancies.
Synthesized complex operational metrics into actionable insights by integrating an AI module, cutting executive reporting time by 70% using the Gemini Pro model.
Boosted customer retention by 20% by implementing RFM segmentation and predictive modeling for time-series forecasting across 1,000+ data points in structured environments.

projects.name: AI Stock News Sentiment Analysis
bullet_points: Engineered an autonomous NLP sentiment engine using FinBERT to increase precision by 45%, distinguishing complex nuances in 1,000+ live financial headlines daily.
Parallelized web scraping and sentiment workflows using FastAPI BackgroundTasks, which eliminated application latency by 80% while processing unstructured data from multiple news sources.
Calibrated a custom market validation layer for NSE/BSE tickers, achieving 100% accuracy in identifying relevant data points within high-frequency news discovery pipelines.

projects.name: EasyInterview AI
bullet_points: Orchestrated a multimodal AI layer using Google Gemini 2.5 to synchronize voice and text analysis, maintaining sub-500ms latency during intensive machine learning simulations.
Quantified and bridged 40+ critical keyword gaps in user resumes by developing an ATS-aligned diagnostic engine with role-skill heatmaps for machine learning readiness.
Vectorized 10+ concurrent data signals, including gaze and posture, to generate accurate performance analytics, boosting candidate confidence scores by 60% through real-time feedback.

education.degree: BTech Computer Science Engineering - Artificial Intelligence
